data.biography: Tara Tipa (Nickname: Boat) is a Thai actor and model. Boat is famous for starring in "Fai Ruk Plerng Kaen."
data.name: Tara Tipa
ธารา ทิพา

data.biography:
Vanessa Redgrave CBE (born 30 January 1937) is an English actress and political activist.  Redgrave rose to prominence in 1961 playing Rosalind in the Shakespeare comedy As You Like It with the Royal Shakespeare Company and has since starred in more than 35 productions in London's West End and on Broadway, winning the 1984 Olivier Award for Best Actress in a Revival for The Aspern Papers, and the 2003 Tony Award for Best Actress in a Play for the revival of Long Day's Journey into Night. She also received Tony nominations for The Year of Magical Thinking and Driving Miss Daisy.

On screen she has starred in scores of films and is a six-time Oscar nominee, winning the Academy Award for Best Supporting Actress for the title role in the film Julia (1977). Her other nominations were for Morgan: A Suitable Case for Treatment (1966), Isadora (1968), Mary, Queen of Scots (1971), The Bostonians (1984), and Howards End (1992). Among her other films are A Man for All Seasons (1966), Blowup (1966), Camelot (1967), The Devils (1971), Murder on the Orient Express (1974), Prick Up Your Ears (1987), Mission: Impossible (1996), Atonement (2007), Coriolanus (2011), and The Butler (2013). Redgrave was proclaimed by Arthur Miller and Tennessee Williams as "the greatest living actress of our times", and has won the Oscar, Emmy, Tony, BAFTA, Olivier, Cannes, Golden Globe, and the Screen Actors Guild awards.
data.name: Vanessa Redgrave

data.biography: Dame Vanessa Redgrave DBE (* 30. Januar 1937 in London) ist eine britische Theater- und Filmschauspielerin. Sie gewann 1978 den Oscar und ist zweifache Golden-Globe-Preisträgerin. Vanessa Redgrave entstammt einer Schauspielerdynastie, die von ihrem Großvater Roy Redgrave (1873–1922) begründet wurde. Auch ihre Eltern Michael Redgrave und Rachel Kempson sowie ihre Geschwister Lynn Redgrave und Corin Redgrave waren in der Filmbranche tätig. Nach ihrer Ballettausbildung besuchte sie die Central School of Speech and Drama und beendete diese im Jahr 1958. Im selben Jahr debütierte sie sowohl am Theater wie auch beim Film an der Seite ihres Vaters. Bis 1966 spielte sie zunächst ausschließlich Theater. 1961 wurde sie Mitglied des renommierten Theaterensembles Royal Shakespeare Company. Ihre dortigen Darstellungen von Rosalinde in Wie es euch gefällt und Kätchen in Der Widerspenstigen Zähmung wurden vom Publikum wie auch von Kritikern gefeiert. Redgrave erhielt zahlreiche Ehrungen als Theaterschauspielerin. Mit ihrer ersten Hauptrolle in Morgan. A Suitable Case For Treatment (dt. Protest, 1966) gelang ihr der Durchbruch beim Film. Neben einer Oscarnominierung erhielt sie den Darstellerpreis bei den Filmfestspielen von Cannes 1966. Michelangelo Antonionis Film Blow Up machte sie einem weltweiten Kinopublikum bekannt und brachte ihr erneut einen Preis in Cannes ein. Zahlreiche Filme folgten, für die sie etliche weitere Nominierungen und Ehrungen erhielt, so 1978 den Oscar als beste Nebendarstellerin für Fred Zinnemanns Julia sowie 1980 den Emmy für den Fernsehfilm Playing For Time nach einem Stoff von Arthur Miller. Als Film- und Fernsehschauspielerin wirkte sie an mehr als 130 Produktionen mit. 2017 gab sie mit der Dokumentation Sea Sorrow ihr Regiedebüt.

Леди Ванесса Редгрейв - британская актриса, одна из членов актёрской династии Редгрейвов. За свою карьеру, охватывающую более семи десятилетий, Редгрейв получила множество наград, среди которых «Оскар», две премии «Золотой глобус», две премии Каннского кинофестиваля, две Прайм-таймовые премии «Эмми» и «Тони», что делает её одной из немногих артистов, получивших «Тройную корону актёрского мастерства».
data.name: Ванесса Редгрейв

data.biography: Vanessa Mariah Redgrave, (Greenwich, 30 de janeiro de 1937) é uma atriz britânica. Ela é uma das 23 pessoas que alcançaram a Tríplice Coroa da Atuação, e em 2003 entrou para o Hall of Fame do American Theatre. Em 2010, Redgrave recebeu um Prêmio BAFTA Fellowship em reconhecimento à sua contribuição ao cinema. No cinema, Redgrave fez sua estreia com o drama médico Behind the Mask (1958), e ganhou destaque com a comédia Deliciosas Loucuras de Amor (1966), que lhe rendeu a primeira de suas seis indicações ao Oscar, vencendo o prêmio de melhor atriz coadjuvante pelo filme Julia (1977).

Vanessa Redgrave CBE (Londres, 30 de gener de 1937) és una actriu anglesa, guanyadora dels premis Oscar i Globus d'Or. Pertany a la família d'actors Redgrave. D'ells, igual que el seu germà Corin Redgrave i la seva germana Lynn Redgrave, va heretar cert gust pel món de la interpretació així com una afinitat a les idees progressistes. És la mare de Joely i Natasha Richardson. Té també un fill Carlo Nero, escriptor i realitzador.

凡妮莎·雷德格雷夫（Vanessa Redgrave，CBE，1937年1月30日-），英国女演员、政治活动家。雷德格雷夫于 1961 年与皇家莎士比亚剧团合作在莎士比亚喜剧《如你所愿》中扮演罗莎琳德而声名鹊起，此后在伦敦西区和百老汇出演了超过 35 部作品，赢得了 1984 年奥利维尔奖最佳女主角奖《阿斯佩恩文件》的复兴，以及 2003 年托尼奖最佳戏剧女主角奖的复兴《漫长的一天》的复兴之夜。她还获得了托尼奖提名，分别是《魔法思维之年》和《黛西小姐》。

在银幕上，她出演了数十部电影，并六次获得奥斯卡提名，并因在电影《朱莉娅》（1977）中的主角而获得奥斯卡最佳女配角奖。她的其他提名包括《摩根：适合治疗的案例》（1966 年）、《伊莎多拉》（1968 年）、《玛丽，苏格兰女王》（1971 年）、《波士顿人》（1984 年）和《霍华德恩德》（1992 年）。她的其他电影包括《四季男人》（1966 年）、《爆炸》（1966 年）、《卡米洛特》（1967 年）、《魔鬼》（1971 年）、《东方快车谋杀案》（1974 年）、《竖起你的耳朵》（1987 年）、《碟中不可能》（1996 年）、《赎罪》（2007 年）、《科里奥兰纳斯》（2011 年）和《管家》（2013 年）。雷德格雷夫被阿瑟·米勒和田纳西·威廉姆斯誉为“我们这个时代最伟大的在世女演员”，并获得了奥斯卡奖、艾美奖、托尼奖、英国电影学院奖、奥利维尔奖、戛纳奖、金球奖和演员工会奖。
data.name: 凡妮莎·雷德格雷夫

data.biography:
凡妮莎·雷德格雷夫（Vanessa Redgrave，CBE，1937 年 1 月 30 日-），英國女演員、政治活動家。雷德格雷夫於 1961 年與皇家莎士比亞劇團合作在莎士比亞喜劇《如你所願》中扮演羅莎琳德而聲名鵲起，此後在倫敦西區和百老匯出演了超過 35 部作品，贏得了 1984 年奧利維爾獎最佳女主角獎《阿斯佩恩文件》的復興，以及 2003 年託尼獎最佳戲劇女主角獎的復興《漫長的一天》的復興之夜。她還獲得了託尼獎提名，分別是《魔法思維之年》和《黛西小姐》。

在銀幕上，她出演了數十部電影，並六次獲得奧斯卡提名，並因在電影《朱莉婭》（1977）中的主角而獲得奧斯卡最佳女配角獎。她的其他提名包括《摩根：適合治療的案例》（1966 年）、《伊莎多拉》（1968 年）、《瑪麗，蘇格蘭女王》（1971 年）、《波士頓人》（1984 年）和《霍華德恩德》（1992 年）。她的其他電影包括《四季男人》（1966 年）、《青春愛爆炸》（1966 年）、《卡米洛特》（1967 年）、《魔鬼》（1971 年）、《東方快車謀殺案》（1974 年）、《豎起你的耳朵》（1987 年）、《碟中不可能》（1996 年）、《愛･誘･罪》（2007 年）、《英雄叛國記》（2011 年）和《管家》（2013 年）。雷德格雷夫被阿瑟·米勒和田納西·威廉姆斯譽為“我們這個時代最偉大的在世女演員”，並獲得了奧斯卡獎、艾美獎、託尼獎、英國電影學院獎、奧利維爾獎、戛納獎、金球獎和演員工會獎。
data.name: 凡妮莎·雷德格雷夫

data.biography: Η Βανέσσα Ρέντγκρεϊβ (Vanessa Redgrave, γενν. 30 Ιανουαρίου 1937) είναι Αγγλίδα ηθοποιός του κινηματογράφου, του θεάτρου και της τηλεόρασης καθώς και πολιτική ακτιβίστρια.
data.name: Βανέσα Ρέντγκρεϊβ

data.biography:
Vanessa Redgrave (Londra, 30 gennaio 1937) è un'attrice e attivista politica inglese. La Redgrave è salita alla ribalta nel 1961 interpretando Rosalind nella commedia di Shakespeare As You Like It con la Royal Shakespeare Company e da allora ha recitato in più di 35 produzioni nel West End di Londra e a Broadway, vincendo l'Olivier Award nel 1984 come migliore attrice in un revival per The Aspern Papers, e il Tony Award nel 2003 come migliore attrice in un'opera teatrale per il revival di Long Day's Journey into Night. Ha anche ricevuto nomination ai Tony per L'anno del pensiero magico e Driving Miss Daisy.

Sullo schermo ha recitato in decine di film ed è stata sei volte candidata all'Oscar, vincendo l'Oscar come migliore attrice non protagonista per il ruolo principale nel film Julia (1977). Le sue altre nomination sono state per Morgan: A Suitable Case for Treatment (1966), Isadora (1968), Mary, Queen of Scots (1971), The Bostonians (1984) e Howards End (1992). Tra i suoi altri film ci sono Un uomo per tutte le stagioni (1966), Blowup (1966), Camelot (1967), The Devils (1971), Assassinio sull'Orient Express (1974), Prick Up Your Ears (1987), Mission: Impossible (1996), Espiazione (2007), Coriolanus (2011) e The Butler (2013). La Redgrave è stata proclamata da Arthur Miller e Tennessee Williams come "la più grande attrice vivente dei nostri tempi", e ha vinto l'Oscar, l'Emmy, il Tony, il BAFTA, l'Olivier, il Cannes, il Golden Globe e lo Screen Actors Guild.

Vanessa Redgrave, 30 Ocak 1937 tarihinde Londra, İngiltere'de dünyaya gelmiştir. Efsanevi aktör Sir Michael Redgrave ve aktris Rachel Kempson'ın kızı olarak, İngiliz tiyatrosunun en köklü hanedanlarından birinin parçası olarak büyüdü. Kardeşleri Lynn Redgrave ve Corin Redgrave de kendisi gibi oyuncu olan Vanessa, eğitimini Londra'daki Central School of Speech and Drama'da tamamladı. Kariyerine 1958 yılında tiyatro sahnesinde ve babasıyla birlikte rol aldığı "Behind the Mask" filmiyle adım attı.

Kısa sürede sahnedeki yeteneğiyle dikkat çeken Redgrave, Royal Shakespeare Company'ye katıldı. Sinemadaki büyük çıkışını ise 1966 yapımı "Morgan: A Suitable Case for Treatment" filmiyle gerçekleştirdi; bu rolüyle Cannes Film Festivali'nde En İyi Kadın Oyuncu ödülünü kazandı ve ilk Oscar adaylığını elde etti. Aynı yıl, Michelangelo Antonioni'nin kült filmi "Cinayeti Gördüm" (Blow-Up) ve "A Man for All Seasons" gibi önemli yapımlarda yer alarak uluslararası bir yıldız statüsüne yükseldi. 1960'ların sonlarında "Camelot" (1967) ve modern dansın öncüsünü canlandırdığı "Isadora" (1968) gibi filmlerle başarısını perçinledi.

1970'ler boyunca hem dönem filmlerinde hem de politik dramalarda güçlü performanslar sergiledi. "Mary, Queen of Scots" (1971) filmindeki kraliçe rolüyle bir kez daha Oscar'a aday gösterildi. Kariyerinin zirve noktalarından biri, Fred Zinnemann'ın yönettiği "Julia" (1977) filmindeki performansıyla geldi; bu rolüyle En İyi Yardımcı Kadın Oyuncu dalında Akademi Ödülü'nü (Oscar) kazandı. Kabul konuşması sırasında yaptığı politik açıklamalar tartışma yaratsa da, oyunculuk yeteneği her zaman ön planda kaldı.

1980'ler ve 1990'lar boyunca "The Bostonians" (1984), "Prick Up Your Ears" (1987) ve "Howards End" (1992) gibi prestijli yapımlarda rol alarak dramatik derinliğini kanıtladı. Aynı zamanda ticari sinemada da boy göstererek "Görevimiz Tehlike" (Mission: Impossible) (1996) ve "Derin Darbe" (Deep Impact) (1998) gibi gişe filmlerinde yer aldı. "Mrs. Dalloway" (1997) filmindeki başrolüyle eleştirmenlerden tam not aldı.

2000'li yıllarda ve sonrasında da aktif kariyerini sürdüren Redgrave, "Kefaret" (Atonement) (2007), "Letters to Juliet" (2010), "Coriolanus" (2011) ve "The Butler" (2013) gibi filmlerde unutulmaz karakterlere hayat verdi. Sinemanın yanı sıra tiyatro ve televizyondaki başarılarıyla da tanınan sanatçı, Oscar, Emmy ve Tony ödüllerinin üçünü de kazanarak "Triple Crown of Acting" unvanına sahip nadir oyunculardan biri oldu.

Oyunculuğunun yanı sıra ömür boyu süren insan hakları aktivizmi ve politik duruşuyla da tanınan Vanessa Redgrave, 2017 yılında mülteci krizini konu alan "Sea Sorrow" belgeseliyle yönetmenlik koltuğuna oturdu. İtalyan aktör Franco Nero ile evli olan Redgrave, oyuncu kızları Joely Richardson ve merhum Natasha Richardson'ın annesidir.

刘威，国家一级演员，毕业于上海戏剧学院。自幼爱好文艺，1974年考入吉林省民间曲艺团学员班，学习相声，1980年考入上海戏剧学院表演系，就读期间参加了影片《秋天印象》拍摄，饰演了一个年轻画家继之著名导演滕文骥执导《海滩》中饰演许彦，影坛崭露头角。

　　1984年毕业分配到长春电影制片厂演员剧团任演员。艺术上刘威面临的第一次挑战，是在1985年陈家林执导的《末代皇后》中饰演李月亭这个角色，这段历史对于刘威来说极其陌生，为了演好这个角色，他阅读了大量有关史料书籍，经过刻苦努力终于成功地刻画了正直多情的李月亭形象。1987年刘威在影片《关东大侠》中主演关云天一角，为了能在银幕上充分表现关云天粗犷、豪爽、侠义的性格，他苦练骑马技术，加之表演上细腻入微，从而使这个关东大汉形象栩栩如生，银幕上形象的塑造使他获得第八届中国电影金鸡奖最佳男主角提名。1988年，刘威改变戏路，在《红房间·白房间·黑房间》中塑造了一个清高、博学、冷峻、多情的马路工形象，他幽默而潇洒自如的表演博得行家的赞赏。刘威的戏路很宽，既能塑造粗犷、冷峻票悍的硬汉形象，又能扮演幽默、诙谐潇洒、顽皮的角色，为同行和观众们所喜爱他现是影视界十分活跃的演员之一。

　　多年来表演领域里荣誉和成绩加身，影、视、舞台等多栖发展表现出的资深功力和在影视圈的好人缘，是不少观众对于刘威的第一印象。作为演员，他对职业和生活的认真与热爱，敬业、严谨面对工作的原则，也让他在业内形成了有目共睹的好口碑。不少品质大剧因为有他的加盟，便有了一颗令制作团队放心的“定盘星”。
data.name: 刘威

data.biography: Lưu Uy (16/10/1957), nam diễn viên người gốc Cát Lâm Trường Xuân, tốt nghiệp học viện Hí kịch Thượng Hải. Năm 1983, ông tham gia vai diễn đầu tiên trong phim điện ảnh Ấn Tượng Ngày Thu. Đến năm 1993, Lưu Uy mới thường góp mặt trong các tác phẩm phim ảnh, nổi bật như vai chính trong Một Gương Mặt Người Sống, tham gia diễn xuất trong Bạch Lộc Nguyên, Thịnh Yến Của Vua, Cuộc Sống Của Chúng Ta Rất Ngọt Ngào...
data.name: Lưu Uy

data.biography:
劉威，國家一級演員，畢業於上海戲劇學院。自幼愛好文藝，1974 年考入吉林省民間曲藝團學員班，學習相聲，1980 年考入上海戲劇學院表演系，就讀期間參加了影片《秋天印象》拍攝，飾演了一個年輕畫家繼之著名導演滕文驥執導《迷幻沙灘》中飾演許彥，影壇嶄露頭角。

1984 年畢業分配到長春電影製片廠演員劇團任演員。藝術上劉威面臨的第一次挑戰，是在 1985 年陳家林執導的《末代皇后》中飾演李月亭這個角色，這段歷史對於劉威來説極其陌生，為了演好這個角色，他閲讀了大量有關史料書籍，經過刻苦努力終於成功地刻畫了正直多情的李月亭形象。1987 年劉威在影片《關東大俠》中主演關雲天一角，為了能在銀幕上充分表現關雲天粗獷、豪爽、俠義的性格，他苦練騎馬技術，加之表演上細膩入微，從而使這個關東大漢形象栩栩如生，銀幕上形象的塑造使他獲得第八屆中國電影金雞獎最佳男主角提名。1988 年，劉威改變戲路，在《紅房間·白房間·黑房間》中塑造了一個清高、博學、冷峻、多情的馬路工形象，他幽默而瀟灑自如的表演博得行家的讚賞。劉威的戲路很寬，既能塑造粗獷、冷峻票悍的硬漢形象，又能扮演幽默、詼諧瀟灑、頑皮的角色，為同行和觀眾們所喜愛他現是影視界十分活躍的演員之一。

多年來表演領域裏榮譽和成績加身，影、視、舞台等多棲發展表現出的資深功力和在影視圈的好人緣，是不少觀眾對於劉威的第一印象。作為演員，他對職業和生活的認真與熱愛，敬業、嚴謹面對工作的原則，也讓他在業內形成了有目共睹的好口碑。不少品質大劇因為有他的加盟，便有了一顆令製作團隊放心的“定盤星”。
data.name: 劉威

data.overview: Người phụ nữ nọ từ một thị trấn nhỏ ở Tamil Nadu chuyển đến Hàn Quốc – vùng đất cô hằng mơ ước – nhưng chật vật tìm chỗ đứng nơi đất khách quê người.
data.title: Made in Korea

data.biography:
Luís Filipe Madeira Caeiro Figo, né le 4 novembre 1972 à Almada, est un footballeur international portugais évoluant au poste de milieu offensif.

Il est considéré comme l'un des plus grands footballeurs portugais de l'histoire, avec Cristiano Ronaldo1 et Eusébio. Sa grande technique, sa puissance et sa vision du jeu font qu'il restera l'un des meilleurs milieux offensifs de sa génération, au même titre que Rui Costa, Rivaldo, ou encore Zinédine Zidane. Il est cité parmi les 125 meilleurs joueurs mondiaux encore vivants en 2004, dans un classement conjoint de Pelé et de la FIFA. Il remporte le Ballon d'or en 2000.

En vingt ans de carrière, entre 1989 et 2009, il joue pour plusieurs des plus grands clubs européens : Sporting Portugal, FC Barcelone, Real Madrid et Inter Milan, dont il devient « ambassadeur » après sa retraite sportive.

Luís Filipe Madeira Caeiro Figo (born 4 November 1972) is a Portuguese retired professional footballer who played as a midfielder for Sporting CP, Barcelona, Real Madrid and Inter Milan. He won 127 caps for the Portugal national team and is considered one of the best Portuguese footballers of all time.

Renowned for his creativity and ability to get past defenders as a winger, Figo is regarded as one of the greatest players of his generation. His 106 assists are one of the most in La Liga history. He won the 2000 Ballon d'Or, 2001 FIFA World Player of the Year, and in 2004 Pelé named him in the FIFA 100 list of the world's greatest living players. Figo is one of the few football players to have played for both Spanish rival clubs Barcelona and Real Madrid. His controversial transfer in 2000 from Barcelona to bitter rivals Real Madrid set a world record fee of €62 million.

Figo had a successful career highlighted by several trophy wins, including the Portuguese Cup, four La Liga titles, two Spanish Cups, three Spanish Super Cups, one UEFA Champions League title, one UEFA Cup Winners' Cup, two UEFA Super Cups, one Intercontinental Cup, four Serie A titles, one Italian Cup and three Italian Super Cups. At international level, he scored 32 goals for Portugal, representing the nation at three European Championships and two World Cups, helping them reach the final but finish as runners-up at Euro 2004.

From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia.
data.name: Luís Figo

data.biography: Armando Rivera is an American actor.  Born and raised in the Coachella Valley, California, USA. His parents, Armando and Lisa Rivera are his biggest inspirations. His father, raised in Mexico, and his mother, raised throughout Europe, both worked tirelessly to create a better life for themselves and their family. Today, they both have Master’s Degrees and have worked in education for over twenty-five years. Armando attributes his work-ethic and his success to the example his parents have provided all his life.  Armando began acting in his senior year of college and has now starred in a wide variety of festival-bound films, commercials and PSAs, and ArtU’s World Premier One-Act Play Festivals. Armando has also been a student-athlete throughout his college career and is currently the captain of the University’s NCAA Division 2 Men’s Soccer Team.
data.name: Armando Rivera

data.biography: Joke is a Thai actor and a singer from the rock bank name 'So Cool' (Thai:โซคูล). So Cool entered a band competition in 2001 and won led them to sign with GMM releasing their first album, So Cool, in 2004.
data.name: Gornpop Janjaroen
